response.justification: While Bogdan is a strong software engineer with proven performance optimization skills and experience working across hardware-software boundaries, the Principal Performance Architect role requires deep specialized expertise in GPU architecture, SoC/IP modeling, and AI accelerator optimization. His background is primarily web/backend and DevOps engineering; he has no demonstrated experience in GPU architecture, neural network workload optimization, or hardware modeling—the core technical pillars of this position. The domain mismatch is fundamental and would require a complete career pivot rather than leveraging existing expertise.
strengths: Demonstrated performance optimization mindset through low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby (async I/O, caching, fiber-based design for millions of requests/second)
Proven ability to work across hardware-software boundaries with C/C++, D-lang, and embedded systems experience including robotic arm development
Track record of rapid learning and advancing to Principal/Staff level roles across multiple organizations
concerns: No GPU architecture or AI accelerator experience despite role requiring Principal-level expertise in this domain
Completely lacking SoC/IP modeling background, which is a core technical requirement for this position
Career experience is primarily web/backend and DevOps engineering rather than hardware optimization or systems architecture for accelerators
